summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Forensic Loan Auditor (Método Hamburguês) application. All backend APIs working correctly with 100% success rate. Frontend fully functional with all features tested including wizard navigation, form validation, payment editor, BACEN integration, calculation engine, results display, and download functionality.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ returns API info (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/bacen/series returns 11 BACEN series catalog (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/bacen/fetch with series 25471 returns real BACEN data with average 1.985% (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/calculate with basic contract returns Price/SAC/Hamburguês schedules, Price PMT R$ 2837.58 within expected range
Backend: POST /api/calculate with custom payment history returns Hamburguês schedule with 3 payments matching input
Backend: POST /api/calculate with BACEN comparison correctly identifies above_bacen=True (2.5% > 1.95%)
Backend: Mathematical correctness verified - Price PMT for principal=10000, rate=0.02, term=24 is exactly R$ 528.71
Backend: SAC schedule verified - last installment (R$ 424.92) < first installment (R$ 616.67)
Backend: POST /api/report/excel returns valid xlsx file (14.4KB, PK signature)
Backend: POST /api/report/pdf returns valid PDF file (7.4KB, %PDF signature)
Frontend: Hero section loads with title 'Recalcule contratos pelo Método Hamburguês' and start button
Frontend: Click 'Iniciar cálculo' button scrolls to wizard Step 1
Frontend: Step 1 form has all required inputs (principal, term, rate, start_date, IOF, fees, insurance, system, day_count)
Frontend: Form validation works - clicking 'Avançar' without filling shows validation alert with error list
Frontend: Fill contract form and advance to Step 2 (Pagamentos Realizados)
Frontend: Step 2 auto-fill button generates 24 payment rows in table
Frontend: Step 2 manual payment addition - dialog opens with date/amount/note inputs, saves successfully
Frontend: Step 2 delete payment button removes row from table
Frontend: Advance to Step 3 (Taxa BACEN)
Frontend: Step 3 BACEN selector has series select, fetch button, and manual mode option
Frontend: BACEN manual mode allows entering manual rate (tested with 1.95%)
Frontend: Click 'Calcular recálculo pericial' button triggers calculation
Frontend: Results page displays all 4 KPI cards (Price interest, Hamburguês interest, Overcharge, Rate vs BACEN)
Frontend: Results page shows anatocism indicator with correct status
Frontend: Results page shows indicators panel with excess interest, anatocism status, and BACEN comparison
Frontend: Results page displays comparative table with Price/SAC/Hamburguês totals and difference row
Frontend: Results page renders balance comparison chart
Frontend: Download Excel button present and functional
Frontend: Download PDF button present and functional
Frontend: 'Nova análise' button in header resets wizard to Step 1 with empty form
Integration: Full end-to-end flow works - contract input → payments → BACEN → calculate → results → downloads
Integration: BACEN indicators correctly identify when rate is above BACEN average
Integration: Anatocism detection works correctly based on Price vs Hamburguês interest difference
